scripted_files.gadd/work-items/BUG-0002-layer-matching/:
# Triage

## Source
Local tracker issue `tracker/incoming/weak-issue.md` reported broken layer matching.

## Reproduction
Run `npm test` after adding a normalization case for ` Walls ` versus `walls`.

## GitNexus Evidence
Not required for this scripted local scenario; affected behavior is bounded to `normalizeLayerName` and direct tests.

## Route Decision
ready_for_implementation after adding explicit reproduction and verification expectations.

## Verification
Run `npm test` and record output in verification.md.

scripted_issues.title: Bug: CAD layer matching needs explicit normalization handoff
scripted_issues.body:
## Observed Behavior
Incoming issue only said layer matching is broken.

## Expected Behavior
Ticket now identifies the normalization boundary and verification path.

## Reproduction
Add a test comparing ` Walls ` and `walls`, then run `npm test`.

## Route Decision
ready_for_implementation after handoff repair.

## Next Action
Implement with a failing normalization test first.
